- Developer tools (seed, reset, fake data)

- Context-sensitive detail views (Company/Site/Participant pages with sub-lists)

Handover: DeckHand / AppyDeck — Data Directory Pattern

  Context: During development of DeckHand, a crash loop was hitting:
  Error: listen EADDRINUSE: address already in use :::5031

  Root cause: nodemon was watching server/src/**/*.{ts,json}. When the server wrote to server/src/config/deckhand.json (via the config save API),
  nodemon detected the JSON change and restarted — but the old process hadn't released port 5031 before the new one trie

We have an issue with the brandConfig. This might help you. 

BRAND CONFIG PROBLEM - FliHub on Other Machines
================================================

SYMPTOM
-------
In the POEM WUI tab of FliHub, the brand config status shows:
  "⚠ not found — brandConfig will be null"
instead of:
  "✓ loaded"

This means the workflow payload sent to POEM WUI will have brandConfig: null,
so any POEM WUI workflow step that depends on brand data (CTAs, affiliates,
playlists, social links) will be missin
